titles.text: Hi no Tori - Houou Hen - Gaou no Bouken
火の鳥 Hino Tori 鳳凰編 我王の冒険
火の鳥 鳳凰編 我王の冒険

roms.name: Hi no Tori - Houou Hen - Gaou no Bouken (Japan)

descriptions.text: 手塚治虫の漫画「火の鳥」を基にしたこのプラットフォーマーは、主に第5巻「鳳凰編」（2004年5月に北米で「カルマ」と呼ばれるようになった）に基づいています。ここでは、幼少期に腕と目を失い、仲間から蔑まれた盗賊ガオウを操作します。それ以来、彼は生き残るために様々な手段、特に殺人に頼るようになりました。しかし、ある日、彼は彼の生き方を変えるよう促す僧侶と戦い、未発見の自然な才能である彫刻を追求するようになります。その才能は、彼の raw emotion に満ちたユニークな彫刻に活かされます。そして、彼はかつて自分に攻撃された彫刻家アカネマルと出会い、二人は不死の血を飲む者に永遠の命を授けると言われる鳳凰との出会いを重ねていきます。そして、残りの物語が展開されます。
Hi no Tori Hououhen: Gaou no Bouken is a licensed action platformer with block placing mechanics, based on Osamu Tezuka's Phoenix (Hi no Tori) manga series.

As a child, a young boy named Gaou lost an arm and an eye, and as a result, from a young age he was discriminated against and teased, unable to fit in with his peers. The constant ridicule and persecution caused Gaou to become bitter, and hardened, eventually turning to a life as a murderous bandit. In spite of his wicked and corrupt lifestyle, Gaou met a woman who saw goodness in him, and the two were married. However, one day, over nothing more than a trifling disagreement, Gaou lost control of himself, and killed his wife. Realization of what he had done caused Gaou to deeply regret his wicked deeds, and reform his behavior. Gaou encountered a Buddhist monk who helped him change his ways, and discover his passion for sculpting. Renouncing his previous life of violence, Gaou became a Buddhist sculptor, devoting himself to the creation of magnificent sculptures renowned for the raw and powerful emotions he was able to invoke in his work. One day, together with a fellow sculptor Akanemaru, Gaou encountered a mythical phoenix, who, according to legend, can bestow eternal life to those who drink its blood. Inspired, Gaou devotes himself to the creation of a magnificent phoenix sculpture. However, shortly after finishing the sculpture, it was stolen from him, broken into 16 pieces, and hidden in different time periods of the past and the future. In order to recover the 16 phoenix sculpture pieces, Gaou embarked on a perilous journey that would take him through space and time.
